response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-relevant tools, plus strong architecture and DevOps exposure, but his seniority level (Staff/Senior roles for over a decade) vastly exceeds the junior/mid-level requirement, and his German language barrier and high on-site expectation pose significant cultural/logistical risks despite his Berlin-based roles.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and React experience across multiple production systems
Proven full-stack ownership from API to UI with clean architecture focus
Extensive DevOps and infrastructure exposure (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS CDK)
concerns: Overqualified with 10+ years of senior experience, mismatched for junior/mid role
German language proficiency is only basic, critical for on-site collaboration
History of founding open-source projects and teaching may indicate misalignment with individual contributor focus
